# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-access-service
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-access-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-access-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app-container
        image: my-app:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          fsGroup: 2000
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
            add:
            - NET_BIND_SERVICE
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "64Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: another-direct-service
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: another-direct-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: another-direct-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app-container
        image: another-app:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9090
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 2000
          fsGroup: 3000
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
            add:
            - NET_BIND_SERVICE
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "32Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "64Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
